subject: Mid-year CIP package - due before the submission window closes
snippet: Andrew, the district needs your mid-year campus improvement plan progress and ex
body: Andrew, the district needs your mid-year campus improvement plan progress and expenditure package before the submission window closes. Send me the read when it is ready.

subject: Volunteer sign-in sheets scanned - some rows half-filled
snippet: Scanned the parent-volunteer sign-in sheets from the literacy night and the cult
body: Scanned the parent-volunteer sign-in sheets from the literacy night and the cultural showcase. A few rows have no time-out and one name is illegible.

subject: Sponsor pledges - a couple still unpaid
snippet: Andrew, a few sponsors pledged for the family events but the funds have not land
body: Andrew, a few sponsors pledged for the family events but the funds have not landed yet. Want your call on who we credit before I send thank-yous.

subject: CIP tracker - some items marked done without evidence
snippet: Walked the improvement-plan board. A handful are marked complete but have no evi
body: Walked the improvement-plan board. A handful are marked complete but have no evidence attached. Goal 2 looks behind.

subject: Title I supplemental - mid-year expenditure report reminder
snippet: Reminder that the after-school enrichment supplemental grant needs a mid-year ex
body: Reminder that the after-school enrichment supplemental grant needs a mid-year expenditure true-up with stipend hours documented.

subject: Music program stipend hours for the pay period
snippet: Hi Andrew, submitting my guest-teacher hours for the enrichment sessions this pe
body: Hi Andrew, submitting my guest-teacher hours for the enrichment sessions this period.

subject: Documentation standard for stipend hours
snippet: Each stipend payment must be supported by a time-and-effort record of delivered
body: Each stipend payment must be supported by a time-and-effort record of delivered hours. Payments beyond documented hours must be reconciled.

subject: Family engagement turnout numbers
snippet: Pulled the event roster against the ticketed check-ins. The cultural showcase lo
body: Pulled the event roster against the ticketed check-ins. The cultural showcase logged more than checked in - want to square it before we report.

subject: Classroom hardware tickets - lab station still blocked
snippet: A couple of lab hardware tickets are still open and blocking instruction. Some o
body: A couple of lab hardware tickets are still open and blocking instruction. Some older ones were fixed but left open.

subject: Front office read - who is waiting on you
snippet: Andrew, here is who is holding a piece you need for the submission. I can chase
body: Andrew, here is who is holding a piece you need for the submission. I can chase the owners this week.

subject: Guest teachers - a note before the report goes in
snippet: Andrew, the guest-teacher crew would love a word once the mid-year numbers are s
body: Andrew, the guest-teacher crew would love a word once the mid-year numbers are settled. No rush.

subject: Sunday family lunch - the usual
snippet: Dad, we are on for Sunday after church. I will bring Ba Noi's favorite. Love you
body: Dad, we are on for Sunday after church. I will bring Ba Noi's favorite. Love you.
